title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in July 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
summary: July 2026 offers a compelling slate of new streaming content across major platforms, including Netflix's 'Enola Holmes' and Apple's 'Silo.' Despite numerous releases, it may still be a good month to reconsider streaming subscriptions and expenses. The month reflects the competitive landscape among streaming services vying for viewer attention.

title: Record beef imports are flooding the U.S. — so why is your Fourth of July BBQ so expensive?
summary: Despite record beef imports entering the U.S., consumers face elevated beef prices heading into July Fourth celebrations, creating a paradox for holiday barbecues. The government's approach to address meat costs through increased imports has not translated into lower consumer prices. This supply-demand disconnect raises questions about the efficacy of import-based pricing strategies.
content: Beef prices are sizzling and Washington’s recipe for high costs — import more meat — only grills your wallet.

zh.title: 创纪录的牛肉进口涌入美国——那么你的独立日烧烤为什么这么贵？
zh.summary: 尽管创纪录的牛肉进口涌入美国，消费者在7月4日庆祝活动前面临牛肉价格上升，为假日烧烤造成了悖论。政府通过增加进口来解决肉类成本的做法并未转化为消费者价格下降。这种供需脱节引发了对基于进口定价策略有效性的质疑。

title: Your aging parent has a new romance. Here’s how to protect your inheritance — without looking greedy.
summary: Financial experts recommend that adult children discuss estate planning with aging parents before they remarry to protect family wealth interests. These conversations should address wills, beneficiaries, and asset distribution while respecting the parent's autonomy and new relationship. Proper planning can prevent future family disputes and ensure assets align with original intentions.
content: Before your single mom or dad remarries, talk with them about estate-planning issues.

content: Some islanders say changes will help but others are worried about their data being shared.

zh.title: 对信用卡计划的期待与担忧
zh.summary: 信用卡计划的变化在客户中引起了不同反应，一些人欢迎这些修改，而另一些人对数据隐私表示担忧。这些分歧反映了便利性改进和个人数据保护之间更广泛的矛盾。

title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde has signaled she may leave her position early to pursue political opportunities in France, introducing uncertainty into European monetary policy leadership. Her potential departure comes amid ongoing inflation concerns and critical economic management needs. This development could reshape the ECB's policy direction depending on her successor.
content: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.

zh.title: 克里斯蒂娜·拉加德为提前离开欧央行敞开大门，同时考虑法国政治
zh.summary: 欧央行行长克里斯蒂娜·拉加德表示，她可能会提前离开职位，以在法国追求政治机会，这给欧洲货币政策领导层带来了不确定性。她的潜在离职发生在持续的通胀担忧和关键经济管理需求的背景下。这一发展可能会根据她的继任者改变欧央行的政策方向。

title: Tackle workplace sickness to unlock hidden growth, former John Lewis boss says
summary: A 'Get Britain Working' taskforce led by a former John Lewis executive has recruited over 250 major UK employers to address workplace sickness and its impact on productivity. The initiative emphasizes that reducing unplanned absences can unlock significant economic growth and competitiveness. This effort reflects growing recognition that employee wellness is linked to national economic performance.
content: More than 250 of the UK's biggest employers have signed up to his 'Get Britain Working' taskforce.

zh.title: 解决工作场所病假以释放隐藏增长，前约翰·路易斯首席执行官表示
zh.summary: 由前约翰·路易斯高管领导的"让英国恢复工作"特别工作组已招募超过250家英国主要雇主来解决工作场所病假及其对生产力的影响。该倡议强调，减少计划外缺勤可以释放显著的经济增长和竞争力。这一努力反映了人们日益认识到员工健康与国家经济表现息息相关。

title: Gold prices set for first weekly rise in a month as investors scale back Fed rate hike bets
summary: Gold prices are on track for their first weekly gain in a month as investors reduce expectations for an upcoming Federal Reserve rate hike. The metal's strength reflects diminishing bets on rate increases.
content: The metal was boosted as investors scaled back their bets on a looming rate hike.

zh.title: 随着投资者缩减美联储加息预期，黄金价格创一月来首周上升
zh.summary: 黄金价格有望创一个月来首次周涨幅，因投资者降低对即将到来的美联储加息的预期。金属的强势反映了对加息的下注预期下降。

title: Kuaishou shares jump after Tencent joins $2.8 billion raise for Kling AI subsidiary
summary: Kuaishou's stock surged following Tencent's $2.8 billion investment in the company's Kling AI subsidiary, signaling strong investor confidence in the venture. Shares initially jumped nearly 7% before moderating to gain 0.75%.
content: Kuaishou shares rose as much as 6.89% at Friday's Hong Kong market open before paring gains to trade around 0.75% higher.

zh.title: 腾讯加入Kling AI子公司28亿美元融资后，快手股票上涨
zh.summary: 腾讯对该公司Kling AI子公司的28亿美元投资后，快手股票大幅上涨，显示投资者对该风险投资的信心强劲。股价最初上涨近7%，随后回落至上涨0.75%。

title: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
summary: A severe heat wave is threatening to strain U.S. power grids and disrupt July 4 holiday travel plans during one of the busiest travel periods of the year. The extreme temperatures could force widespread changes to Independence Day celebrations.
content: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.

zh.title: 极端热浪威胁美国电网和7月4日出行
zh.summary: 严重的热浪可能会给美国电网带来压力，并扰乱7月4日假期旅行计划，这是一年中最繁忙的旅行期间之一。极端高温可能会导致独立日庆祝活动发生广泛变化。

title: Oman walks a diplomatic tightrope over Strait of Hormuz fees, creating a ‘blind spot’ for markets
summary: Oman is employing strategic ambiguity in negotiations over possible Strait of Hormuz transit fees, creating uncertainty in global oil markets and raising legal and diplomatic complexities. The nation's careful balancing act highlights emerging geopolitical risks to energy markets.
content: Oman is using strategic ambiguity as talks over possible Strait of Hormuz fees raise legal, diplomatic and oil market concerns.

zh.title: 阿曼在霍尔木兹海峡费用问题上走外交钢丝，为市场造成"盲点"
zh.summary: 阿曼在可能的霍尔木兹海峡过境费谈判中采取战略模糊态度，引发全球石油市场的不确定性，并增加法律和外交复杂性。这个国家的精妙平衡突显了能源市场面临的新兴地缘政治风险。

title: Burnham says there is some room for movement on tax
summary: Labour Party's likely next Prime Minister Keir Burnham indicates flexibility on tax policy while maintaining commitment to core pledges against raising VAT, income tax, or national insurance. His statement suggests potential room for targeted tax adjustments elsewhere.
content: But the likely next PM says he will stick to Labour's pledges to not raise VAT, income tax or national insurance.

zh.title: 伯纳姆表示税收政策有一定灵活空间
zh.summary: 工党下一任可能的首相基尔·伯纳姆表示在税收政策上有灵活性，同时保持对核心承诺的承诺，不会提高增值税、所得税或国民保险。他的声明暗示可能在其他地方进行有针对性的税收调整。

title: Weak jobs growth and easing oil prices reinforce expectations for Fed pause, analysts say
summary: Weakening job growth and declining oil prices are reinforcing analyst expectations that the Federal Reserve will pause interest rate increases in the near term. Eased Middle East tensions further support the case for holding rates steady.
content: U.S. Fed is unlikely to raise interest rates for now, amid lower oil prices and eased tensions in the Middle East, analysts say.

zh.title: 弱就业增长和油价下降增强了分析师对美联储暂停加息的预期
zh.summary: 弱化的就业增长和油价下跌强化了分析师对美联储在近期暂停加息的预期。中东紧张局势缓解进一步支持了保持利率稳定的立场。

title: Security staff to go on strike at Aberdeen Airport
summary: Baggage screening staff at Aberdeen Airport are set to begin strike action on Monday, with the Unite union warning of significant operational delays. The labor action highlights ongoing employment disputes in aviation security.
content: The strikes, involving baggage screening staff, are set to begin on Monday with the Unite union warning of "significant delays".

zh.title: 阿伯丁机场安保员工将罢工
zh.summary: 阿伯丁机场行李检查员工将于周一开始罢工行动,Unite工会警告称会造成重大运营延误。这次劳工行动反映了航空安保领域的持续就业纠纷。

title: Safe havens aren't behaving like they used to. Here's what's changed
summary: Traditional safe-haven investments like U.S. Treasury bonds, Japanese yen, and gold have failed to provide their expected protective value during 2026's market volatility. This breakdown of historical patterns suggests investors may need to reassess their portfolio diversification strategies. The shift reflects changing market dynamics and potential structural changes in global financial markets.
content: Traditional safe-haven assets — U.S. Treasurys, the Japanese yen and gold — have struggled to provide protection during this year’s market volatility.

zh.title: 避险资产不再像过去那样有效。这里是变化所在
zh.summary: 传统避险投资（如美国国债、日元和黄金）在2026年市场波动期间未能提供预期的保护价值。这种历史模式的崩溃表明投资者可能需要重新评估其投资组合多样化策略。这一转变反映了不断变化的市场动态和全球金融市场可能发生的结构性变化。

title: Livery bookings rise as horse owners struggle with costs
summary: Horse livery bookings are increasing as owners seek affordable alternatives for equine care amid rising ownership costs. The service provides a cost-effective solution for managing horse care expenses.
content: The livery provides an affordable service for owners to be able to have their horses cared for.

zh.title: 养马费用上升,马主寻求经济型替代方案
zh.summary: 随着养马所有权成本上升,马匹寄养预订量增加,主人们寻求可负担的替代方案。该服务为管理马匹护理支出提供了具成本效益的解决方案。

title: 'Less than 10% sheep': How millions may have unknowingly eaten goat, skin and fat kebabs
summary: Millions of consumers likely unknowingly consumed kebabs labeled as lamb that were actually made from goat, including skin and fat. The discovery raises serious food labeling and fraud concerns for regulatory authorities.
content: Millions are likely to have eaten "lamb" kebabs that were actually made with goat, skin and fat.

zh.title: "不足10%的羊肉":数百万人可能在不知情下吃了山羊烤肉串
zh.summary: 数百万消费者很可能在不知情的情况下食用了标注为羊肉但实际由山羊制成的烤肉串,包括皮肤和脂肪。这一发现对监管部门的食品标签和欺诈问题提出了严重关注。

title: Rafael Nadal talks tennis prize money, his hotels, and what sports taught him about business
summary: Tennis legend Rafael Nadal is expanding his business ventures into hospitality and education through his fourth hotel opening while discussing prize money and entrepreneurship. His diversification strategy reflects the evolution of modern athlete business ventures.
content: Rafael Nadal opened his fourth Zel hotel as he expands into hospitality, education and sports after retiring from tennis.

zh.title: 拉法·纳达尔谈网球奖金、酒店及体育对经营的启示
zh.summary: 网球传奇人物拉法·纳达尔通过开设第四家酒店，扩展了他在酒店管理和教育领域的商业版图，同时讨论奖金和创业话题。他的多元化战略反映了现代运动员商业活动的发展趋势。

title: Is the stock market open today? Here’s how Fourth of July weekend affects trading hours.
summary: With Independence Day falling on Saturday in 2026, U.S. stock markets and other institutions will observe modified hours around the holiday weekend. Investors should note the schedule changes for Fourth of July trading.
content: Since Independence Day falls on Saturday this year, here’s what to know about markets, mail delivery and more.

zh.title: 股市今天开盘吗？独立日周末如何影响交易时间
zh.summary: 由于2026年独立日恰好在星期六，美国股市和其他机构将在假期周末期间采用修改后的交易时间。投资者应注意独立日交易的时间表变化。

title: Instagram running ads promoting child sexual abuse material in India, BBC finds
summary: The BBC documented Instagram running advertisements using explicit terms related to child sexual exploitation and linking to illegal content on Telegram in India. The discovery exposes a serious platform security failure in protecting minors.
content: The ads use terms including “rape” and “child video” and link to content on the messaging app Telegram.

zh.title: BBC发现Instagram在印度投放宣传儿童性虐待材料的广告
zh.summary: BBC纪录了Instagram在印度投放使用与儿童性剥削相关的明确术语的广告，并链接到Telegram上的非法内容。这一发现暴露了该平台在保护未成年人方面的严重安全漏洞。

title: Venezuela quake toll climbs to 2,595 as damage estimates mount after strongest tremor in a century
summary: The death toll from Venezuela's twin earthquakes has risen to 2,595 following the nation's strongest seismic activity in over a century. Rescue operations continue as authorities assess mounting infrastructure damage across the affected regions.
content: Death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela jumped to 2,595, as rescue operations continued after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.

zh.title: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数攀升至2,595人，一个世纪以来最强震动后损失评估增加
zh.summary: 委内瑞拉双地震导致的死亡人数已上升至2,595人，这是该国一个多世纪以来最强的地震活动。救援行动继续进行，当局正在评估受灾地区日益增加的基础设施损害。

title: President Donald Trump defends business dealings, his children in exclusive interview with CNBC
summary: Trump spoke with CNBC about his business dealings and family as he prepares to celebrate the U.S. bicentennial with July 4 events on the National Mall.
content: Trump spoke with CNBC as he prepares to celebrate the 250th birthday of the U.S. on July 4 with an event and fireworks on the National Mall in Washington.

zh.title: 特朗普总统在CNBC独家专访中为自己的商业交易和子女进行辩护
zh.summary: 特朗普与CNBC讨论了他的商业交易和家庭，他正在为即将在国家广场举行的7月4日美国建国250周年庆典做准备。

title: Oil up slightly ahead of long US weekend as peace efforts hold
summary: Oil prices rose on Friday before the U.S. holiday weekend, buoyed by cautious optimism over ongoing peace negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in the Middle East.
content: Oil rose on Friday before a long holiday weekend in the U.S. as wary optimism held over efforts to make peace in the Middle East between the U.S. and Iran.

zh.title: 美国长假前油价小幅上涨，和平努力继续进行
zh.summary: 在美国假期周末前的周五，由于美国与伊朗中东和平谈判的谨慎乐观情绪，油价上涨。

title: Dollar heads for weekly drop as jobs data dims Fed hike bets
summary: The dollar fell toward its biggest weekly drop in nearly three months after weak June jobs data pushed back market expectations for Federal Reserve rate hikes.
content: The dollar was on track for the biggest weekly drop in nearly three months on Friday, after a tepid June jobs report pushed back markets expectations for Fed rate hikes.

zh.title: 由于就业数据疲弱削弱美联储加息预期，美元周跌
zh.summary: 在6月就业数据疲弱推迟市场对美联储加息预期后，美元跌向近三个月来最大的周跌幅。

title: Asia markets trade mixed as chip slump weighs on sentiment: Live updates
summary: Asia-Pacific markets showed mixed trading on Friday as investors continued rotating away from technology stocks, tracking U.S. market declines in the chip sector.
content: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed on Friday as investors continued rotating out of technology stocks, tracking declines in the U.S.

zh.title: 亚洲市场交投不一，芯片低迷影响市场人气：实时更新
zh.summary: 亚太市场周五交投不一，投资者继续从科技股中撤出，追踪美国芯片板块的下跌。

title: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
summary: Nvidia launched a program allowing AI-focused start-ups to swap computing power access for revenue shares, addressing cost barriers for early-stage companies.
content: Nvidia says it will give start-ups the chance to swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits under a new program aimed at AI-focused firms.

zh.title: 英伟达为初创公司提供以计算能力换取收益分成的机会
zh.summary: 英伟达推出一项计划，允许专注于人工智能的初创公司以计算能力换取收益分成，解决早期公司的成本障碍。
